title: CUB Digital Evolution
subtitle: Reimagining CUB's web banking for India's evolving digital finance landscape.
problem_statement: CUB's current digital presence lacks proactive financial guidance and engaging tools for modern Indian users.

pillars.title: Financial Security
pillars.insight: Users seek safety and control over their hard-earned money.

pillars.title: Control & Clarity
pillars.insight: Users want clear overview of spending and account activities.

pillars.title: Effortless Management
pillars.insight: Users desire quick, simple transactions and bill payments.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we empower users with proactive financial insights?
How might users feel more engaged with their finances?
How might we integrate personalized financial wellness tools?

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need smart tools to grow my savings.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient ways to manage finances and invest for future goals.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Managing family expenses should be simpler.
personas.bio: Juggles business and family, needs intuitive tools for daily banking and bill management.

insights: Am I saving enough for my future?
I wish banking was easier to understand.

points.action: Substitute manual budgeting with AI-driven insights.
Combine banking with personalized financial coaching.
Adapt gamification principles for savings goals.
Modify transaction history into visual spending trends.

pivot.before: CUB is a transactional platform for basic banking needs.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from reactive transactions to proactive financial wellness and personalized guidance.
pivot.after: CUB becomes an intelligent financial partner empowering user growth.

annotations.title: Smart Budgeting
annotations.rationale: AI-driven expense categorization and proactive alerts.

annotations.title: Goal Tracker
annotations.rationale: Visual progress for savings and investment goals.

annotations.title: Wellness Score
annotations.rationale: Gamified metric for overall financial health.

data.finding: Daily Expense amount hidden by default, requires interaction.
Multiple navigation patterns (bottom bar, scrollable icons).
Fund transfer input is free-form, no clear validation.
Provides 'View All Accounts' and 'View All' options.
